compiled_state.title: Create emit-commit-workflow-event.sh wrapper
compiled_state.author: Main
compiled_state.description:
## Description

Create plugins/dso/scripts/emit-commit-workflow-event.sh with --phase=start|end flag.

--phase=start: Records wall-clock timestamp to artifact file (commit-start-timestamp in artifacts dir), emits commit_workflow event with phase=start, timestamp, session_id, epic_id via emit-review-event.sh.

--phase=end: Reads start timestamp from artifact, computes duration_ms, emits commit_workflow event with phase=end, timestamp, success (true/false), failure_reason (optional), duration_ms via emit-review-event.sh. Accepts --success=true|false and --failure-reason=<text>.

Invocation: SCRIPT_DIR/emit-review-event.sh commit_workflow '<json>'
Best-effort: return 0 even if emit fails.

## TDD Requirement
GREEN — Task 1 RED tests pass.

## Files to Modify
- plugins/dso/scripts/emit-commit-workflow-event.sh (create)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] All tests pass. Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] Script exists and is executable. Verify: test -x plugins/dso/scripts/emit-commit-workflow-event.sh
- [ ] All 5 commit event tests pass. Verify: bash tests/scripts/test-emit-commit-workflow-event.sh

comments.body: CHECKPOINT: Script created at plugins/dso/scripts/emit-commit-workflow-event.sh, chmod +x applied, all 5 tests GREEN (10/10 assertions pass).
comments.author: Main
